title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
